# Moonrise Studio
# https://trymoonrise.com
# Last updated: 2026-07-19

> Moonrise Studio helps creators build professional websites for local businesses and earn when clients unlock the live site.

## What Moonrise is

Moonrise Studio (trymoonrise.com) is an AI-powered web platform for selling websites to local business owners, creators, and freelancers. Users find leads, generate client-ready sites, publish watermarked previews, and earn when the business owner pays on the live site.

## How it works

1. **Find** — Use Business Finder to discover local businesses that need a website.
2. **Build** — Generate and customize a site in the Moonrise builder (free to preview).
3. **Close** — Send the published link. When the owner pays on the watermark checkout, the site goes live without the watermark. Creators keep 80%; Moonrise keeps 20%.

## Pricing model

- Building, previewing, and publishing: free for creators
- Client go-live: paid by the business owner through the watermark on the live site (creators set the Website Price, often around $500)
- After payment: watermark removed automatically and the clean site stays published
- Creator revenue share: 80% to creator, 20% to Moonrise
- Optional: MVP+ donations and credit plans for extra creator tools

## Primary pages

- Home: https://trymoonrise.com/

- Locate a published order: https://trymoonrise.com/orders.html
- Download app / install: https://trymoonrise.com/download.html
- Contact: https://trymoonrise.com/contact.html
- Privacy: https://trymoonrise.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://trymoonrise.com/terms.html

## Support

- Email: trymoonrise@gmail.com

## FAQ

**What is Moonrise Studio?**
An AI website builder and sales platform for creators who want to sell sites to local businesses.

**Who is it for?**
Side hustlers, freelancers, and creators targeting shops, cafes, salons, and other local businesses.

**Do creators pay to build?**
No. Creators build and preview for free. Payment happens when the client unlocks the live site.

**How do creators get paid?**
When a client completes checkout on the watermarked live site, the creator receives 80% of the sale. The watermark is removed automatically after payment.

**Do business owners need a Moonrise account?**
No. They pay on the live site through the watermark checkout.

## Community

- Discord: https://discord.gg/yFJajbBNj

## Crawl notes

Public marketing and support pages may be indexed. Authenticated app pages (dashboard, builder, editor, settings) are private and should not be cited as public product documentation.

Sitemap: https://trymoonrise.com/sitemap.xml
